title: Piglin Netherite Upgrades
description: Changes Netherite Upgrades to have a Piglin Snout symbol instead of an arrow.
body:
Why do Netherite Upgrades have an arrow on them in-world? I understand it communicates "upgrade" in game design but it does not make as much sense for immersion. Changes **Netherite Upgrades** to have a **Piglin Snout symbol** instead of an arrow. Bonus: the item is now centered too as a result (you're welcome). Since Netherite Upgrades appear to have been originally created by the Piglins (or a group that was adjacent), it seems reasonable to me that the symbol of the piglins would be fitting to appear on these templates. ## #### MintRefresh:
